channel.title: UNDP Jobs (filtered: D/P only)
channel.description: Only D1–D2 and P1–P6 jobs. Everything else excluded.

item.title: Job title Post level Apply by Agency Location Job Title WHO JPO - Technical Officer (Sexual, Reproductive, Maternal, Newborn Health) Post level P2 App [P2] — Job Title WHO JPO - Technical Officer (Sexual, Reproductive, Maternal, Newborn Health) Post level P2 Apply by May-5-26 Agency UNDP Location Copenhagen, Denmark Job Title UN Clinic Doctor (Open to all applicants). Post level P3 Apply by May-7-26 Agency UNDP Location Copenhagen, Denmark
item.description:
Level: P2
Location: Job Title WHO JPO - Technical Officer (Sexual, Reproductive, Maternal, Newborn Health) Post level P2 Apply by May-5-26 Agency UNDP Location Copenhagen, Denmark Job Title UN Clinic Doctor (Open to all applicants). Post level P3 Apply by May-7-26 Agency UNDP Location Copenhagen, Denmark
Link: https://estm.fa.em2.oraclecloud.com/hcmUI/CandidateExperience/en/sites/CX_1/requisitions/job/33216
